spec.title: Q1: Average Departure Delay Trend by Airline
spec.description: Shows the mean departure delay over time for each selected airline. Values are aggregated over Grafana time buckets from the Q1 airline performance results.

spec.query:
from(bucket: "restored-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q1_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.airline =~ /^${airline:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "dep_delay_mean")
  |> group(columns: ["airline"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Delay Mean")

spec.title: Q2: Maximum Departure Delay by Airport - Latest 6h Window
spec.description: Shows the airports ranked in the latest available 6-hour Q2 window by their maximum observed departure delay.

spec.query:
base_data = from(bucket: "restored-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q2_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "6h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "origin_airport_id" or r["_field"] == "dep_delay_max")

latest_batch = base_data
  |> keep(columns: ["_time"])
  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_time")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

base_data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_time"] == latest_batch._time)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "rank"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ 
      rank_int: int(v: r.rank),
      "Airport": "#" + r.rank + " - Airport \"" + string(v: r.origin_airport_id) + "\"",
      "Max Delay": float(v: r.dep_delay_max)
     }))
  |> sort(columns: ["rank_int"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Airport", "Mean Delay", "Max Delay"])

spec.title: Q3: Departure Delay Min/Max by Airline - 1d
spec.description: Daily Flink windows. Hours are collapsed within each 1-day logical window: min is the lowest hourly minimum and max is the highest hourly maximum for each airline.

spec.query:
import "date"

minSeries =
  from(bucket: "restored-data")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q3_results")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "1d")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["airline"] =~ /^${airline:regex}$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "min")
    |> group(columns: ["airline", "_time", "_field"])
    |> min(column: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _time: date.add(d: 1d, to: r._time),
        label: r.airline + " - Min"
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "airline", "label"])

maxSeries =
  from(bucket: "restored-data")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q3_results")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "1d")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["airline"] =~ /^${airline:regex}$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "max")
    |> group(columns: ["airline", "_time", "_field"])
    |> max(column: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with
        _time: date.add(d: 1d, to: r._time),
        label: r.airline + " - Max"
    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "airline", "label"])

union(tables: [minSeries, maxSeries])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> yield(name: "Q3_1d_Min_Max")

spec.title: Q3: Average Departure Delay Percentiles by Airline - 7d
spec.description: Seven-day Flink windows. For each airline and percentile, the panel averages the hourly percentile values observed within each 7-day logical window and plots the point at the window end.

spec.query:
import "date"

from(bucket: "restored-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q3_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "7d")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["airline"] =~ /^${airline:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "p25" or
    r["_field"] == "p50" or
    r["_field"] == "p75" or
    r["_field"] == "p90"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["airline", "_field", "_time"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _time: date.add(d: 7d, to: r._time),
      label: r.airline + " - Avg " + r._field
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "airline", "_field", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> yield(name: "Q3_7d_Avg_Percentiles_By_Hour")

spec.title: Q3: Departure Delay Percentiles by Airline - Global Latest Snapshot
spec.description: Global window snapshot. The panel uses only the latest global state and averages the percentile values across observed scheduled departure hours for each airline.

spec.query:
data =
  from(bucket: "restored-data")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q3_results")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "global")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["airline"] =~ /^${airline:regex}$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "p25" or
      r["_field"] == "p50" or
      r["_field"] == "p75" or
      r["_field"] == "p90"
    )

latest = data
  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_time")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._time == latest._time)
  |> group(columns: ["airline", "_field"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      label: r.airline + " - " + r._field
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "airline", "_field", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> yield(name: "Q3_Global_Last_Percentiles")

maxSeries =

    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        r with

    }))
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "airline", "label"])

union(tables: [minSeries, maxSeries])

spec.title: Q1: Latest Average Departure Delay by Airline
spec.description: Shows the most recent mean departure delay value for each selected airline after Grafana time-bucket aggregation.

spec.query:
from(bucket: "restored-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q1_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.airline =~ /^${airline:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "dep_delay_mean")
  |> group(columns: ["airline"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "Last Delay Mean")

spec.title: Q3: Hourly Departure Delay Percentiles - Latest 1d Window
spec.description: Latest daily Flink window only. Shows p25, p50, p75 and p90 by scheduled departure hour for each selected airline.

spec.query:
data =
  from(bucket: "restored-data")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q3_results")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "1d")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["airline"] =~ /^${airline:regex}$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "p25" or
      r["_field"] == "p50" or
      r["_field"] == "p75" or
      r["_field"] == "p90"
    )

latest = data
  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_time")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._time == latest._time)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      hour_int: int(v: r.hour),
      label: r.airline + " - " + r._field
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "airline", "hour", "hour_int", "_field", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> sort(columns: ["hour_int"])
  |> yield(name: "Q3_1d_Last_Window_Hourly_Percentiles")

spec.title: Q3: Hourly Departure Delay Min/Max - Latest 1d Window
spec.description: Latest daily Flink window only. Shows effective hourly minimum and maximum departure delay for each selected airline.

spec.query:
data =
  from(bucket: "restored-data")
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q3_results")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "1d")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["airline"] =~ /^${airline:regex}$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "min" or r["_field"] == "max")

latest = data
  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_time")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._time == latest._time)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      hour_int: int(v: r.hour),
      label: r.airline + " - " + (if r._field == "max" then "Max Delay" else "Min Delay")
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "airline", "hour", "hour_int", "_field", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> sort(columns: ["hour_int"])
  |> yield(name: "Q3_1d_Last_Window_Hourly_Min_Max")

    r["_field"] == "p25" or
    r["_field"] == "p50" or
    r["_field"] == "p75" or
    r["_field"] == "p90"
  )
  |> group(columns: ["airline", "_field", "_time"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _time: date.add(d: 1d, to: r._time),
      label: r.airline + " - Avg " + r._field
  }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "airline", "_field", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> yield(name: "Q3_1d_Avg_Percentiles_By_Hour")

spec.title: Q2: Airports with Most Severe Delays - Latest 1h Window
spec.description: Ranks airports by the number of severe delay events in the latest available 1-hour Q2 window.

spec.query:
base_data = from(bucket: "restored-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q2_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "origin_airport_id" or r["_field"] == "severe_delays")

latest_hour = base_data
  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_time")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

base_data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_time"] == latest_hour._time)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "rank"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ 
      rank_int: int(v: r.rank),
      airport_str: string(v: r.origin_airport_id),
      _value: int(v: r.severe_delays)
     }))
  |> sort(columns: ["rank_int"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["rank_int", "airport_str", "_value"])

spec.title: Q2: Maximum Departure Delay by Airport - Latest 1h Window
spec.description: Shows the airports ranked in the latest available 1-hour Q2 window by their maximum observed departure delay.

spec.query:
base_data = from(bucket: "restored-data")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flights_q2_results")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_type"] == "1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "origin_airport_id" or r["_field"] == "dep_delay_max")

latest_batch = base_data
  |> keep(columns: ["_time"])
  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_time")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

base_data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_time"] == latest_batch._time)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "rank"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ 
      rank_int: int(v: r.rank),
      "Airport": "#" + r.rank + " - Airport \"" + string(v: r.origin_airport_id) + "\"",
      "Max Delay": float(v: r.dep_delay_max)
     }))
  |> sort(columns: ["rank_int"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Airport", "Mean Delay", "Max Delay"])

spec.title: Q2: Mean Departure Delay by Airport - Latest 1h Window
spec.description: Shows the airports ranked in the latest available 1-hour Q2 window by their mean departure delay.

latest_batch = base_data

  |> group()
  |> max(column: "_time")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

base_data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_time"] == latest_batch._time)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "rank"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({

      "Airport": "#" + r.rank + " - Airport \"" + string(v: r.origin_airport_id) + "\"",

     }))
  |> sort(columns: ["rank_int"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Airport", "Mean Delay", "Max Delay"])
